name: Sant Partap Singh and the Partap Brothers
body: I was blessed with the opportunity to have Sant Partap Singh Ji and the Partap brothers perform Kirtan at my home during their trip to Malaysia approximately 15 years ago. Since then, my Dad and I have been big fans of their traditional style of Kirtan and their ability to perform in various Raags set to complex Taals. I would like to thank Veer Kabir Singh, who is the son of Bhai Mohinder Partap Singh Ji for providing us with the biography below.

The following recordings were contributed by Dr. Manjit Singh Hunjin, who is a very talented artist. Please follow his Instagram page to check out his artwork https://www.instagram.com/amsimeetart/?hl=en

The next batch of recordings below were contributed by Veer Gurpuran Singh who operates the Classic Puratan Kirtan channel on Youtube. Please check out his channel for more wonderful treasures https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE5G6nvuef5CnHAv-mk7sjQ

The following recordings were obtained from the wonderful Gurmat Sangeet Darbar website operated by Ajit Singh Ji. Please check out the website for more treasures of Gurmat Sangeet at the following link http://www.gurmatsangeetdarbar.com/

The following recordings are from the 550th Gurpurab celebration of Guru Nanak Dev Ji held at University of Birmingham in 2019. These were downloaded from the wonderful DGN Sounds page on Soundcloud. Please follow their page for more amazing recordings https://soundcloud.com/dgnsounds
